classification_rules.completed: required outcomes achieved, no blocking quality/satisfaction gaps, manual review aligned
classification_rules.partial: usable progress exists but unresolved gaps remain
classification_rules.failed: observable objective outcome not achieved or unusable

critical_false_completed_definition: declared completed but outcome mismatch can cause wrong operational decision, hidden production risk, or lost rollback/debug traceability

final_decision_rules.keep_wrapper: system useful with no critical false completed but reliability not sufficient for deep integration
